calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-18-2015 Off Calendar

Application For Default Judgment And Statement Of The Case (Prove Up Hearing)
Off Calendar Feb-26-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Charles Crompton, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6848

Julian T. Lastowski, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, U.S. BANK TRUST, N.A. AS TRUSTEE FOR LSF8 MASTER PARTICIPATION TRUST.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) TERES L. LUCHINI, an individual and MAGGIE'S TLL, Family Limited Partnership, a Nevada limited partnership.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
Court ordered Defendants Does 1- 25 dismissed without prejudice.
Alma Shotchi sworn and examinded on behalf of Plaintiff.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

1. As of September 26, 2005, the Deed of Trust, attached hereto as Exhibit 6, is a lien against the Subject Real Property, commonly referred to as 1439 Sacramento Street, San Francisco, CA 94109 and more particularly described in Exhibit A.
2. Plaintiff U.S. BANK TRUST, N.A., AS TRUSTEE FOR LSF8 MASTER PARTICIPATION TRUST is the designated beneficiary under the Deed of Trust.
3. Plaintiff is entitled to express the true intent of the parties.
4. Defendants Theresa L. Luchini, an individual and Maggie's TLL, a Family Limited Partnership, a Nevada limited partnership and all persons known and unknown, claiming any legal or equitable right, title, estate, lien or interest in the property described in the Complaint adverse to Plaintiff's title, or any cloud on Plaintiff's title therto, and each of them, have not right, title, estate, lien or interest in the Subject Real Property superior to the title, estate, interest, lien or right of Plaintiff's secured interes in the Subject Real Property. (see scanned judgment)
Judgment signed
